TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Lmaung, title = Lmaung, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lmaung} }

S.FORM: == lmaung == Lmaung nii we ooda ptcamac mpqhedu kingal knkawas alang miyan yami nSeediq. Ali ciida we msuupu daha, teru alang uxe duri we sepac alang, suupu mosa cmebu camac kana ka seediq laalang kingal Gaya miyan yami Seediq nTgdaya, wano seediq mnarux ini kbeyax ma mqedil hani mntuting laqi ka meniq alng, mosa kana ka rdrudan ma lqlaqi tnaalang. pnsramal mplaung Kesun lmaung nii we migin kingal bungu tikuh hari ka ptcmanan daha ma, krmanun daha dmayan ka kssiyo mtqiri bungu tikuh nii ma, mdengu ka qqhuni, ssudu ma wwahil dnyangan daha de pdungusun daha kingal ali ka mplaung camac. Mgleing qmburang mtquri lmiqu ini dyangi ka seediq alang, riso ma riso laqi hari ka pniqun daha tgberah bale ma, meniq tgbukuy rriso ka rudan, meniq bukuy drudan ka mqeding ma laqi. huwa mesa lmaung Btaqun daha puniq ka dnyangan hdurun daha ka bungu kiya, ye ado hduran ka lmiqu de mqquri nganguc qduriq ka cmcamac mneniq ckceka bungu lmiqu di ma, buun daha ciida ka camac denu. Camac nungalan daha we pntnaun maasu seediq alang, smepu hei seediq maasu uxe smepu tnsapah, meniq ka mqedil ga skpahung ge biqan daha pnsugan ka dheya. So nii msaasu ge Gaya malu bale yami nSeediq, ini puyu Gaya so nii ka seediq miyan saya di, hawan ba bbale! Pteumal pptasun Snrnuwan na Tado Walis Pawan Nawi ma Siyac Nabu Dakis PawanśēīÁźÜ
S.PHON: == lmauŇč == lmauŇč nii w…ô ooda pt ¶ama ¶ mpqńß…ôdu kiŇčal knkawas alaŇč mijan jami ns…ô…ôdiq. ali ¶iida w…ô msuupu dańßa, t…ô…ĺu alaŇč ux…ô du…ĺi w…ô s…ôpa ¶ alaŇč, suupu mosa ¶m…ôbu ¶ama ¶ kana ka s…ô…ôdiq laalaŇč kiŇčal gaja mijan jami s…ô…ôdiq ntgdaja, wano s…ô…ôdiq mna…ĺux ini kb…ôax ma mq…ôdil ńßani mntutiŇč laqi ka m…ôniq alŇč, mosa kana ka …ĺd…ĺudan ma lqlaqi tnaalaŇč. pns…ĺamal mplauŇč k…ôsun lmauŇč nii w…ô migin kiŇčal buŇču tikuńß ńßa…ĺi ka pt ¶manan dańßa ma, k…ĺmanun dańßa dmajan ka kssijo mtqi…ĺi buŇču tikuńß nii ma, md…ôŇču ka qqńßuni, ssudu ma wwańßil dnjaŇčan dańßa d…ô pduŇčusun dańßa kiŇčal ali ka mplauŇč ¶ama ¶. mgl…ôiŇč qmbu…ĺaŇč mtqu…ĺi lmiqu ini djaŇči ka s…ô…ôdiq alaŇč, …ĺiso ma …ĺiso laqi ńßa…ĺi ka pniqun dańßa tgb…ô…ĺańß bal…ô ma, m…ôniq tgbukuj …ĺ…ĺiso ka …ĺudan, m…ôniq bukuj d…ĺudan ka mq…ôdiŇč ma laqi. ńßuwa m…ôsa lmauŇč btaqun dańßa puniq ka dnjaŇčan ńßdu…ĺun dańßa ka buŇču kija, j…ô ado ńßdu…ĺan ka lmiqu d…ô mqqu…ĺi ŇčaŇču ¶ qdu…ĺiq ka ¶m ¶ama ¶ mn…ôniq ¶k ¶…ôka buŇču lmiqu di ma, buun dańßa ¶iida ka ¶ama ¶ d…ônu. ¶ama ¶ nuŇčalan dańßa w…ô pntnaun maasu s…ô…ôdiq alaŇč, sm…ôpu ńß…ôi s…ô…ôdiq maasu ux…ô sm…ôpu tnsapańß, m…ôniq ka mq…ôdil ga skpańßuŇč g…ô biqan dańßa pnsugan ka dńß…ôa. so nii msaasu g…ô gaja malu bal…ô jami ns…ô…ôdiq, ini puju gaja so nii ka s…ô…ôdiq mijan saja di, ńßawan ba bbal…ô! pt…ôumal pptasun sn…ĺnuwan na tado walis pawan nawi ma sija ¶ nabu dakis pawan**
S.FORM: == lmaung == Lmaung nii we ooda ptcamac mpqhedu kingal knkawas alang miyan yami nSeediq. Ali ciida we msuupu daha, teru alang uxe duri we sepac alang, suupu mosa cmebu camac kana ka seediq laalang kingal Gaya miyan yami Seediq nTgdaya, wano seediq mnarux ini kbeyax ma mqedil hani mntuting laqi ka meniq alng, mosa kana ka rdrudan ma lqlaqi tnaalang. pnsramal mplaung Kesun lmaung nii we migin kingal bungu tikuh hari ka ptcmanan daha ma, krmanun daha dmayan ka kssiyo mtqiri bungu tikuh nii ma, mdengu ka qqhuni, ssudu ma wwahil dnyangan daha de pdungusun daha kingal ali ka mplaung camac. Mgleing qmburang mtquri lmiqu ini dyangi ka seediq alang, riso ma riso laqi hari ka pniqun daha tgberah bale ma, meniq tgbukuy rriso ka rudan, meniq bukuy drudan ka mqeding ma laqi. huwa mesa lmaung Btaqun daha puniq ka dnyangan hdurun daha ka bungu kiya, ye ado hduran ka lmiqu de mqquri nganguc qduriq ka cmcamac mneniq ckceka bungu lmiqu di ma, buun daha ciida ka camac denu. Camac nungalan daha we pntnaun maasu seediq alang, smepu hei seediq maasu uxe smepu tnsapah, meniq ka mqedil ga skpahung ge biqan daha pnsugan ka dheya. So nii msaasu ge Gaya malu bale yami nSeediq, ini puyu Gaya so nii ka seediq miyan saya di, hawan ba bbale! Pteumal pptasun Snrnuwan na Tado Walis Pawan Nawi ma Siyac Nabu Dakis PawanśēīÁźÜ
S.PHON: == lmauŇč == lmauŇč nii w…ô ooda pt ¶ama ¶ mpqńß…ôdu kiŇčal knkawas alaŇč mijan jami ns…ô…ôdiq. ali ¶iida w…ô msuupu dańßa, t…ô…ĺu alaŇč ux…ô du…ĺi w…ô s…ôpa ¶ alaŇč, suupu mosa ¶m…ôbu ¶ama ¶ kana ka s…ô…ôdiq laalaŇč kiŇčal gaja mijan jami s…ô…ôdiq ntgdaja, wano s…ô…ôdiq mna…ĺux ini kb…ôax ma mq…ôdil ńßani mntutiŇč laqi ka m…ôniq alŇč, mosa kana ka …ĺd…ĺudan ma lqlaqi tnaalaŇč. pns…ĺamal mplauŇč k…ôsun lmauŇč nii w…ô migin kiŇčal buŇču tikuńß ńßa…ĺi ka pt ¶manan dańßa ma, k…ĺmanun dańßa dmajan ka kssijo mtqi…ĺi buŇču tikuńß nii ma, md…ôŇču ka qqńßuni, ssudu ma wwańßil dnjaŇčan dańßa d…ô pduŇčusun dańßa kiŇčal ali ka mplauŇč ¶ama ¶. mgl…ôiŇč qmbu…ĺaŇč mtqu…ĺi lmiqu ini djaŇči ka s…ô…ôdiq alaŇč, …ĺiso ma …ĺiso laqi ńßa…ĺi ka pniqun dańßa tgb…ô…ĺańß bal…ô ma, m…ôniq tgbukuj …ĺ…ĺiso ka …ĺudan, m…ôniq bukuj d…ĺudan ka mq…ôdiŇč ma laqi. ńßuwa m…ôsa lmauŇč btaqun dańßa puniq ka dnjaŇčan ńßdu…ĺun dańßa ka buŇču kija, j…ô ado ńßdu…ĺan ka lmiqu d…ô mqqu…ĺi ŇčaŇču ¶ qdu…ĺiq ka ¶m ¶ama ¶ mn…ôniq ¶k ¶…ôka buŇču lmiqu di ma, buun dańßa ¶iida ka ¶ama ¶ d…ônu. ¶ama ¶ nuŇčalan dańßa w…ô pntnaun maasu s…ô…ôdiq alaŇč, sm…ôpu ńß…ôi s…ô…ôdiq maasu ux…ô sm…ôpu tnsapańß, m…ôniq ka mq…ôdil ga skpańßuŇč g…ô biqan dańßa pnsugan ka dńß…ôa. so nii msaasu g…ô gaja malu bal…ô jami ns…ô…ôdiq, ini puju gaja so nii ka s…ô…ôdiq mijan saja di, ńßawan ba bbal…ô! pt…ôumal pptasun sn…ĺnuwan na tado walis pawan nawi ma sija ¶ nabu dakis pawan**
